# delete

**Instance Method**

Deletes one or more records.

## Declaration

```swift
CloudKit.RecordsBatchBuilder delete(
	CloudKit.Record|CloudKit.Record[] records
);
```

## Parameters

- **records**: A [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.Record] dictionary representing the record to delete, if you are deleting a single record. If you are deleting multiple records, this parameter is an array of [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.Record] dictionaries. The [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.Record] dictionaries need to contain the `recordChangeTag` key.

## Return Value

The object that received this method call.

## Deleting Records

- **forceDelete**: Deletes one or more records regardless of conflicts.
